Tiny Velium Gargoyle  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +2 INT: +2 HP: +40
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Tiny Velium Gargoyle
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +2 INT: +2 HP: +40
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:jagg
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:08
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name

This thing is range slot, so you won't get a graphic, but I do agree that there should at the very least be skulls, bones, and a paw graphic. The wooden voodoo doll is no fun anymore.

Dementieva of Tallon

#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 19 2001 at 9:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah a bone grapic would look good for my Noclins Femur so that it dont look like your everyday cracked staff
